_comment: Persistent human curation decisions for the publications list. scripts/curate.py reads this so re-running the pipeline never requires re-doing the manual review. Edit this file to change decisions.

excluded_ids.title: A Modified Feature Optimization Approach with Convolutional Neural Network for Apple Leaf Disease Detection
excluded_ids.reason: Name collision - a different Vagisha Sharma (ML / apple leaf disease detection; co-authors Amandeep Verma, Neelam Goel). Confirmed not mine.

preprint_policy.description: Keep a preprint only if it has NO corresponding published (non-preprint) paper. Matching is by normalized title. Preprints with a published counterpart are dropped so the paper is counted once (the published version is kept).

notes: piNET (W2937896859, 2019 bioRxiv) has no published counterpart -> kept as a preprint.
If a future re-fetch adds a published version of piNET, the auto-rule will drop the preprint automatically.
